prompt: In this repository, add a new read-only endpoint that returns a lightweight summary for a single item. It must be a GET route whose path ends in `/summary` for a single item id, live in the same router module as the existing item detail endpoints, and follow this repository's existing conventions for that router: obtain the database session through the same session dependency the other item endpoints use, enforce the same authentication/current-user dependency the other item endpoints use, and declare a response_model. Produce the change as edits to the repository's files. Do not add new dependencies or new files unless the repository's own conventions require it. Write any explanatory text in English.

provenance.note: Assertions are scoped to the diff's ADDED lines (scope=added), not the whole worktree, so pre-existing SessionDep/CurrentUser/response_model in items.py cannot pre-satisfy them (adversarial review S1): the AGENT's added route code must carry the conventions. This is a proximity heuristic over added text, not proof of runtime auth enforcement or full conformance (that is the blinded reviewer's job).

assertions.desc: the added code declares a GET route whose path ends in summary
the added route code uses the repo SessionDep dependency
the added route code uses the repo CurrentUser auth dependency
the added route declares a response_model
